description: Shadow implementation: request asks to remove 'Minij' but patch creates a parallel clean architecture in new files and leaves old dirty code untouched. Should block.
request_text: Data and Role Cleanup: remove 'Minij' references across the codebase, remove 'master admin' role, clean dummy data, and fix session caching.
normalized_request: Clean up 'Minij' references and 'master admin' role from existing modules.
diff:
